online.label: Online
online.headline: AVAILABLE
online.message: I'm currently active at my desk. It's a great time to reach out for a quick response.

holidays.label: On Leave
holidays.headline: ON VACATION
holidays.message: I'm currently away taking some time off. I'll get back to you as soon as I return.

offline.label: Offline
offline.headline: AWAY
offline.message: I'm currently not at my computer. Feel free to leave a message, I'll reply when I'm back.

status.howItWorksDescription: This status indicator is synced in real-time with my computer's activity. It lets you know if I'm currently at my desk and available to chat, or if I'm away and might take a bit longer to respond.

hero.description: Software Engineer focused on backend and data. I transform technical complexity into efficient automation, designing scalable and resilient architectures.

story.paragraph1: I don't just write code; I build tools that give people their time back. I identify operational bottlenecks and create solutions that reduce tasks from months to hours.
story.paragraph2: I move between development and infrastructure with a strong foundation in Python and PostgreSQL. My rule is clear: complexity must stay in the system, never in the user's hands.
story.paragraph3: Since technology only scales through people, I also focus on human capital. I've mentored over 10 professionals, ensuring that technical knowledge is the true driver of team growth.

horus.title: PostgreSQL DBA
horus.description: Management of PostgreSQL clusters, query optimization, automation of maintenance routines and implementation of high availability solutions using Patroni and Pgpool2.

present.title: Founder & Software Engineer
present.description: Focus on Cloud-Native infrastructure R&D, migration to Kubernetes and High Availability architectures.

idbrasil.title: Infrastructure & Data Engineer
idbrasil.description: Data modeling for BI, infrastructure inventory automation, automated E2E testing and SQL performance optimization.

tributech.title: Data Engineer & Technical Leadership
tributech.description: Responsible for data engineering (ETL/SQL), geoprocessing automation and onboarding of 10+ professionals.

academic.title: Researcher (Thesis)
academic.description: In-depth study of PostgreSQL clusters, Patroni, Pgpool2 and distributed consensus algorithms.

education.title: Software Engineering
education.description: Solid foundation in architecture, methodologies, processes and software development.

readyToStart.description: Three steps. Infinite possibilities. One single purpose.

data.title: Data & HA
data.subtitle: Data Engineering and Resilience
data.description: Design and optimization of critical data architectures. Specialist in PostgreSQL, replication, complex ETL routines and ensuring high availability (HA) for operations that cannot stop.

backend.title: BACKEND
backend.subtitle: Systems Architecture
backend.description: Building robust and scalable server-side solutions that power your business logic. Secure APIs, efficient databases focusing on performance and maintainability.

devops.title: DEVOPS
devops.subtitle: Cloud Infrastructure
devops.description: Automating the bridge between code and deployment. CI/CD pipelines, container orchestration and cloud infrastructure management ensuring your software runs smoothly everywhere.

footer.tagline: What can I do for you?

promptEngineered.title: How This Site Was Built
promptEngineered.subtitle: Built with AI, guided by human vision
promptEngineered.p1: Here's the thing — this entire website was created 100% by AI, but don't worry, I was watching closely the whole time! Think of me as the director and the AI as the talented crew bringing the vision to life.
promptEngineered.p2: Every line of code, every design decision, and every animation you see here was crafted through careful prompt engineering. I guided the process, refined the outputs, and made sure everything aligned with my vision — but the heavy lifting? That was all AI.
promptEngineered.p3: This whole project was built using <highlight>vibe coding</highlight> — that flow state where you just go with the feeling, iterate on the fly, and let the creative process guide you. No rigid planning, just pure experimentation and refinement until it feels right.
promptEngineered.p4: It's pretty wild what's possible when you combine human creativity with AI capabilities. This site is a testament to that collaboration — showing that with the right prompts, a clear vision, and a good vibe, you can build something truly special.
